event_comments:
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Result Status Codes
msp: missing punch
dnf: did not finish
nc: not competing
dq: disqualified
ovt: overtime
dns: did not start
<time>* indicates course completion status was not reported and may be valid, msp, or dnf
cumulative_event_comments:
Partway through the event, control #149 (on Short Advanced Long Advanced courses only) was stolen. In order to make the results as fair as possible, we voided the legs to and from #149. As a result, your total elapsed time does not include those two split times. Unfortunately, WinSplits and Attackpoint can’t properly display the split times when legs are voided, so those results include your original time (with interpolated splits to/from the missing control).
If you lost a smart watch at the event, email info@cascadeoc.org with a description.
